name: Kruger L-22 AlphaWolf PHB Flight Blade
short_name: Kruger L-22 AlphaWolf PHB Flight Blade
description:
Manufacturer: Broad & Rabiee
Type: Flight Blade

Unlock the potential of your Kruger L-22 AlphaWolf with the PHB Flight Blade from Broad & Rabiee. By re-allocating forward thrust resources, you can expect your ship to deliver increased precision handling during tight maneuvers.
